mapper.sql: id, settleSeq, dispatchId, dispatchSeq, progressDesc, progressRatio, acceptanceDesc, acceptanceRatio, ratio, amount, memo, confirmTime, paymentTime, remark, state, sseId, year, quarter, month, customInfo, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, disabled, settled
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_dispatch_project_settlement (settleSeq, dispatchId, dispatchSeq, progressDesc, progressRatio, acceptanceDesc, acceptanceRatio, ratio, amount, memo, confirmTime, paymentTime, remark, state, sseId, year, quarter, month, customInfo, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, disabled, settled ) values (#{settleSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{progressDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{progressRatio,jdbcType=REAL}, #{acceptanceDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptanceRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ratio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sseId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{year,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{quarter,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{month,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{settled,jdbcType=BIT} )

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_dispatch_project_settlement
settleSeq,
dispatchId,
dispatchSeq,
progressDesc,
progressRatio,
acceptanceDesc,
acceptanceRatio,
ratio,
amount,
memo,
confirmTime,
paymentTime,
remark,
state,
sseId,
year,
quarter,
month,
customInfo,
createTime,
createBy,
updateTime,
updateBy,
disabled,
settled,
#{settleSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dispatchId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{progressDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{progressRatio,jdbcType=REAL},
#{acceptanceDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{acceptanceRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ratio,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{amount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sseId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{year,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{quarter,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{month,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{customInfo,jdbcType=OTHER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{settled,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update:
update pm_dispatch_project_settlement
settleSeq = #{settleSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dispatchId = #{dispatchId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dispatchSeq = #{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
progressDesc = #{progressDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
progressRatio = #{progressRatio,jdbcType=REAL},
acceptanceDesc = #{acceptanceDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
acceptanceRatio = #{acceptanceRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ratio = #{ratio,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
amount = #{amount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
memo = #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
confirmTime = #{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
paymentTime = #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sseId = #{sseId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
year = #{year,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quarter = #{quarter,jdbcType=INTEGER},
month = #{month,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}),
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
settled = #{settled,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update pm_dispatch_project_settlement set settleSeq = #{settleSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dispatchId = #{dispatchId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dispatchSeq = #{dispatchSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, progressDesc = #{progressDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, progressRatio = #{progressRatio,jdbcType=REAL}, acceptanceDesc = #{acceptanceDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, acceptanceRatio = #{acceptanceRatio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ratio = #{ratio,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, memo = #{memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, confirmTime = #{confirmTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, paymentTime = #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sseId = #{sseId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, year = #{year,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quarter = #{quarter,jdbcType=INTEGER}, month = #{month,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}), createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, settled = #{settled,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from pm_dispatch_project_settlement s
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
settleSeq = #{settleSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dispatchId = #{dispatchId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dispatchSeq = #{dispatchSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
progressDesc = #{progressDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
progressRatio = #{progressRatio, jdbcType=REAL} AND
acceptanceDesc = #{acceptanceDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
acceptanceRatio = #{acceptanceRatio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ratio = #{ratio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
amount = #{amount, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
memo = #{memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
confirmTime = #{confirmTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
paymentTime = #{paymentTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{state, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
sseId = #{sseId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
year = #{year, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
quarter = #{quarter, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
month = #{month, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.customInfo -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND
createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
settled = #{settled, jdbcType=BIT} AND

select count(1) from pm_dispatch_project_settlement s
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
settleSeq = #{settleSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dispatchId = #{dispatchId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dispatchSeq = #{dispatchSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
progressDesc = #{progressDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
progressRatio = #{progressRatio, jdbcType=REAL} AND
acceptanceDesc = #{acceptanceDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
acceptanceRatio = #{acceptanceRatio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ratio = #{ratio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
amount = #{amount, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
memo = #{memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
confirmTime = #{confirmTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
paymentTime = #{paymentTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{state, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
sseId = #{sseId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
year = #{year, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
quarter = #{quarter, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
month = #{month, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.customInfo -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND
createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
settled = #{settled, jdbcType=BIT} AND

select s.* from pm_dispatch_project_settlement s
left join `pm_dispatch_project_header` d on s.`dispatchId` = d.`id`
s.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.settleSeq = #{model.settleSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.dispatchId = #{model.dispatchId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.dispatchSeq = #{model.dispatchSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.progressDesc = #{model.progressDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.progressRatio = #{model.progressRatio, jdbcType=REAL} AND
s.acceptanceDesc = #{model.acceptanceDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.acceptanceRatio = #{model.acceptanceRatio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.ratio = #{model.ratio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.amount = #{model.amount, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.memo = #{model.memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.confirmTime = #{model.confirmTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
s.paymentTime = #{model.paymentTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
s.remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.state = #{model.state, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.sseId = #{model.sseId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.year = #{model.year, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.quarter = #{model.quarter, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.month = #{model.month, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.customInfo -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND
s.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
s.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
s.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
s.settled = #{model.settled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
find_in_set(#{model.projectId}, d.projectIds)
s.confirmTime >= #{model.dateStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND s.paymentTime >= #{model.dateStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
s.confirmTime <= #{model.dateEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND s.paymentTime <= #{model.dateEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( s.settleSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.progressDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceRatio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.ratio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.amount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.memo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by s.id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from pm_dispatch_project_settlement s
left join `pm_dispatch_project_header` d on s.`dispatchId` = d.`id`
s.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.settleSeq = #{model.settleSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.dispatchId = #{model.dispatchId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.dispatchSeq = #{model.dispatchSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.progressDesc = #{model.progressDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.progressRatio = #{model.progressRatio, jdbcType=REAL} AND
s.acceptanceDesc = #{model.acceptanceDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.acceptanceRatio = #{model.acceptanceRatio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.ratio = #{model.ratio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.amount = #{model.amount, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.memo = #{model.memo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.confirmTime = #{model.confirmTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
s.paymentTime = #{model.paymentTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
s.remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.state = #{model.state, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.sseId = #{model.sseId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.year = #{model.year, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.quarter = #{model.quarter, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.month = #{model.month, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
s.customInfo -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND
s.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
s.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
s.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
s.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
s.settled = #{model.settled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
find_in_set(#{model.projectId}, d.projectIds)
s.confirmTime >= #{model.dateStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND s.paymentTime >= #{model.dateStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
s.confirmTime <= #{model.dateEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND s.paymentTime <= #{model.dateEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( s.settleSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.progressDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceRatio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.ratio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.amount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.memo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
mapper.sql:
h.disabled = false AND
h.`dispatched` = #{model.dispatched} AND
h.dispatchNo like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.dispatchNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.dispatchSeq like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.dispatchSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.dispatchName like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.dispatchName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.smsProjectCode like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.smsProjectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.contractNos like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.contractNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.type like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.facilitatorName like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.facilitatorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
mapper.select:
select h.id as `dispatch.id`, h.`dispatchName` as `dispatch.dispatchName`, h.`dispatchNo` as `dispatch.dispatchNo`, h.`dispatchSeq` as `dispatch.dispatchSeq`, h.`contractNos` as `dispatch.contractNos`, h.`projectIds` as `dispatch.projectIds`, h.`type` as `dispatch.type`, h.`state` as `dispatch.state`, h.`customInfo` as `dispatch.customInfo`, h.id as `dispatchId`, h.dispatchSeq as `dispatchSeq`, ds.settledAmount, h.dispatchAmount as `dispatch.dispatchAmount`, sum(sc.`collected_money_amount`) as collectedAmount, sum(sc.`delivered_money_amount`) as deliveredAmount, sum(sc.`contract_money_amount`) as contractAmount,
ROUND(ds.settledAmount / h.dispatchAmount, 4) as settledRatio,
ROUND(sum(sc.`collected_money_amount`) / sum(sc.`contract_money_amount`), 4) as collectedRatio, s.* from
pm_dispatch_project_header h left join `pm_dispatch_project_settlement` s on h.`id` = s.`dispatchId` and s.`disabled` = false left join `sms_ofst_contract_head_sap` sc on FIND_IN_SET(sc.`contract_num`, h.`contractNos`) left join (select dispatchId, sum(replace(ds.`amount`, ",", "")) as settledAmount from `pm_dispatch_project_settlement` ds where ds.`disabled` = false group by ds.`dispatchId`) ds on ds.`dispatchId` = h.`id` left join fnd_department d on h.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` left join `fnd_basic_data` bd on s.`state` = bd.`basicDataId` and bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'settlementState' left join `fnd_basic_data` bd1 on h.`state` = bd1.`basicDataId` and bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchState' left join `fnd_basic_data` bd2 on h.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` and bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchType'
h.disabled = false AND
h.`dispatched` = #{model.dispatched} AND
h.dispatchNo like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.dispatchNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.dispatchSeq like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.dispatchSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.dispatchName like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.dispatchName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.smsProjectCode like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.smsProjectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.contractNos like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.contractNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.type like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
( s.settleSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.progressDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceRatio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.ratio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.amount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.memo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.dispatchNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.dispatchName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.contractNos like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
group by h.id, s.`id`
order by ${orderBy}
order by settledRatio, s.`id` desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from ( select 1 from pm_dispatch_project_header h left join `pm_dispatch_project_settlement` s on h.`id` = s.`dispatchId` and s.disabled = false
h.disabled = false AND
h.`dispatched` = #{model.dispatched} AND
h.dispatchNo like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.dispatchNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.dispatchSeq like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.dispatchSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.dispatchName like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.dispatchName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.smsProjectCode like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.smsProjectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.contractNos like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.contractNos, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
h.type like concat("%", #{model.dispatch.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
( s.settleSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.progressDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceRatio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.ratio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.amount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.memo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
group by h.id, s.`id`) t

SELECT h.id AS `dispatch.id`, h.`dispatchName` AS `dispatch.dispatchName`, h.`dispatchNo` AS `dispatch.dispatchNo`, h.`dispatchSeq` AS `dispatch.dispatchSeq`, h.`contractNos` AS `dispatch.contractNos` , h.facilitatorId AS `dispatch.facilitatorId`, h.facilitatorCode AS `dispatch.facilitatorCode`, h.facilitatorName AS `dispatch.facilitatorName` , h.`projectIds` AS `dispatch.projectIds`, h.`type` AS `dispatch.type`, h.`state` AS `dispatch.state`
, h.`dispatch.customInfo` , h.id AS `dispatchId` , h.dispatchSeq AS `dispatchSeq`, h.smsProjectCode AS `dispatch.smsProjectCode`, h.customInfo ->> '$.smsOrderExecNumber' AS `smsOrderExecNumber` , h.contractAmount, h.deliveredAmount, h.collectedAmount , h.dispatchAmount AS `dispatch.dispatchAmount`, ds.settledAmount , ROUND(IFNULL(ds.settledAmount / h.dispatchAmount, 0), 4) AS settledRatio , IFNULL(h.collectedRatio, 0) AS collectedRatio , IFNULL(CONCAT(h.projectProgress, '%'), s.progressDesc) AS progressDesc , IFNULL(h.projectStateName, s.acceptanceDesc) AS acceptanceDesc , s.* FROM ( SELECT h.* , SUM(sc.`collected_money_amount`) AS collectedAmount , SUM(sc.`delivered_money_amount`) AS deliveredAmount , SUM(sc.`contract_money_amount`) AS contractAmount , ROUND(SUM(sc.`collected_money_amount`) / SUM(sc.`contract_money_amount`), 4) AS collectedRatio , ph.customInfo ->> "$.projectProgress" AS projectProgress , phsd.`basicDataName` AS projectStateName , JSON_SET(h.customInfo, '$.projectProgress', IFNULL(ph.customInfo ->> "$.projectProgress", 0), '$.projectStateName', IFNULL(phsd.`basicDataName`, "")) AS `dispatch.customInfo` FROM ( SELECT h.* , SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(h.`contractNos`, ',', h.`contractNos`), ',', fih.id + 1), ',', -1) AS contractNo FROM pm_dispatch_project_header h JOIN find_in_set_help fih ON fih.`id` < LENGTH(h.`contractNos`) - LENGTH(REPLACE(h.contractNos, ',', '')) + 1
GROUP BY h.id, contractNo ORDER BY NULL ) h LEFT JOIN sms_ofst_contract_head_sap sc ON sc.contract_num = contractNo LEFT JOIN pm_project ph ON ph.projectId = h.projectIds LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data phsd ON phsd.`dataTypeCode` = concat(ph.`projectType`, "_projectState") AND phsd.`basicDataId` = ph.`projectState` GROUP BY h.id ORDER BY NULL ) h LEFT JOIN `pm_dispatch_project_settlement` s ON h.`id` = s.`dispatchId` AND s.`disabled` = FALSE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dispatchId, SUM(REPLACE(ds.`amount`, ',', '')) AS settledAmount FROM `pm_dispatch_project_settlement` ds WHERE ds.`disabled` = FALSE GROUP BY ds.`dispatchId` ) ds ON ds.`dispatchId` = h.`id` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON h.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON s.`state` = bd.`basicDataId` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'settlementState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON h.`state` = bd1.`basicDataId` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON h.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'dispatchType'
( s.settleSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.progressDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceRatio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.ratio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.amount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.memo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.dispatchNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.dispatchName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.contractNos like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.facilitatorName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
group by h.id, s.`id`
having collectedRatio > settledRatio
having collectedRatio = settledRatio
having settledRatio > collectedRatio
order by ${orderBy}
order by settledRatio, s.`id` desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from ( select h.id AS dispatchId, s.`id` AS settleId , IFNULL(h.collectedRatio, 0) AS collectedRatio , ROUND(IFNULL(ds.settledAmount / h.dispatchAmount, 0), 4) AS settledRatio from ( SELECT h.* , SUM(sc.`collected_money_amount`) AS collectedAmount , SUM(sc.`delivered_money_amount`) AS deliveredAmount , SUM(sc.`contract_money_amount`) AS contractAmount , ROUND(SUM(sc.`collected_money_amount`) / SUM(sc.`contract_money_amount`), 4) AS collectedRatio FROM ( SELECT h.* , SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(CONCAT(h.`contractNos`, ',', h.`contractNos`), ',', fih.id + 1), ',', -1) AS contractNo FROM pm_dispatch_project_header h JOIN find_in_set_help fih ON fih.`id` < LENGTH(h.`contractNos`) - LENGTH(REPLACE(h.contractNos, ',', '')) + 1
GROUP BY h.id, contractNo ORDER BY NULL ) h LEFT JOIN sms_ofst_contract_head_sap sc ON sc.contract_num = contractNo GROUP BY h.id ORDER BY NULL ) h LEFT JOIN `pm_dispatch_project_settlement` s ON h.`id` = s.`dispatchId` AND s.`disabled` = FALSE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dispatchId, SUM(REPLACE(ds.`amount`, ',', '')) AS settledAmount FROM `pm_dispatch_project_settlement` ds WHERE ds.`disabled` = FALSE GROUP BY ds.`dispatchId` ) ds ON ds.`dispatchId` = h.`id`
( s.settleSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.progressDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.acceptanceRatio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.ratio like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.amount like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.memo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or s.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.dispatchNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.dispatchSeq like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.dispatchName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.contractNos like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or h.facilitatorName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
group by h.id, s.`id`
having collectedRatio > settledRatio
having collectedRatio = settledRatio
having settledRatio > collectedRatio
) t
